title: Vertical Scaling ( Vscale)
text: Vertical Scaling ( Vscale) This property determines how the image is scaled vertically; valid only for Image data types. Default value is 100 (percent). Vscale = Percentage | Auto Value Description Percentage Positive integer from 1 through 10000 . Auto Scale the image to fit the width of the widget. Instead of preserving the aspect ratio, it stretches the image to fit the widget. Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? Yes for Picture Dependencies: None Description If the Preserve Aspect property is True , the larger of Horizontal Scale and Vertical Scale properties are ignored. Command Button For command buttons, this property only works if the Representation property is set to Uniface . Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(PICTURE)="vscale=auto" Copy Applies To Area Frames and Lines udefentity (Default Entity Widget ) CommandButton upicture (Picture) Entities Background Image (BackImage) Related Links Horizontal Scaling ( Hscale) This property determines how the image is horizontally scaled; valid only for Image data types. Default value is 100 (percent). Representation This property determines the appearance of the command button when running on the Microsoft Windows operating system (XP and later versions). One of Windows (default), Uniface, or Header. Preserve Aspect Ratio ( PreserveAspect) Determines whether the aspect ratio of the image is preserved at all times. True (default) or False.
